description: Realtor.com is a real estate marketplace for home listings and related professional services. Its support materials for real estate professionals describe lead-delivery integrations and an MCP endpoint is published for AI-agent access.
summary: Realtor.com exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://www.realtor.com/frontdoor/mcp/` with no authentication; support docs also describe a Lead Delivery API used by Realtor.com to send leads to third-party CRMs, but they do not document it as a public developer-callable API surface on realtor.com itself.
